'''''The Fury''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] operated by the [[Mistryl Shadow Guard]].<ref name="Hutt and Seek" /> In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]]<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of "[[Hutt and Seek]]" to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]].</ref> it was commanded by [[Shada D'ukal]], with her young partner [[Dunc T'racen]] acting as co-pilot/gunner, when it was contracted by [[Fenig Nabon]] and [[Ghitsa Dogder]] to transport a troupe of [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancing-girls from [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] to [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]].<ref name="Hutt and Seek" />

''The Fury'' was a mid-sized [[Transport/Legends|transport]], fitted out for combat with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]] and a [[Laser/Legends|laser]] battery, plus full deflector shields. With Shada and Dunc at the controls, it proved more than capable of dealing with a [[Firespray-31-class patrol and attack craft/Legends|''Firespray''-class]] gunship.<ref name="Hutt and Seek" />
